description: Jurisdiction-specific programs where obligation is EXT legal/ops or N/A to current product scope.

rows.n_a_rationale: No in-product autonomous legal decisioning or high-risk AI system as defined by EU AI Act in this repo snapshot.
B2B contract workspace; HIPAA BAA and PHI handling are operator/vendor posture outside application code.
No student education records workflow in product surface.
PSD2 SCA enforced by Stripe; app does not implement issuer SCA flows directly.
UKG regulatory evidence and UGC policies are operator/legal artifacts, not encoded in-repo.
